evals.prompt: Register the domain mynetwork.lan and point it to my tunnels
evals.expected_output: Registers domain and creates DNS A records for each tunnel
expectations: Calls list_tunnels to get assigned IPs
Creates DNS A records pointing tunnel hostnames to their IPs

evals.prompt: Generate a TLS certificate for mysite.crypto
evals.expected_output: Generates key, CSR, and signs certificate with doxx.net CA
expectations: Generates a private key locally with openssl
Creates a CSR with the correct CN
Verifies the certificate with openssl x509
Mentions that clients need the doxx.net root CA installed

evals.prompt: Import my external domain example.com to doxx.net
evals.expected_output: Walks through TXT verification and domain import
expectations: Calls get_domain_validation to get the verification code
Instructs user to set _doxx-verify.example.com TXT record
Calls import_domain after user confirms TXT record is set
Tells user to update nameservers to a.root-dx.net, a.root-dx.com, a.root-dx.org

evals.prompt: Add a CNAME record for blog.mysite.doxx pointing to mysite.doxx
expectations: Calls create_dns_record with type=CNAME, name=blog.mysite.doxx, content=mysite.doxx
